title: Golden Prawn Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and quick stir fry recipe featuring succulent prawns and a mix of savory ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the prawns from the wok and set aside.
Add the mixed vegetables to the wok and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until tender-crisp.
Return the prawns to the wok and stir in the soy sauce, honey, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the prawn stir-fry hot, garnished with sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
Optional: serve with steamed rice or noodles.
